CustomField.description: If checked, the '2c9 Utilities – Timesheet Status Manager' lets users trigger bulk timesheet adjustments. If unchecked, users can only revert unprocessed approved timesheets back to 'New'.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked, the '2c9 Utilities – Timesheet Status Manager' lets users trigger bulk timesheet adjustments. If unchecked, users can only revert unprocessed approved timesheets back to 'New'.
CustomField.label: Allow TS Manager Adjustments
